body:
This commit restores OutputPathGenerator for directory managment and adds a new option, `output_dir_style` to control its behavior.

By default OutputPathGenerator uses the ActiveLinkStyle, meaning that new subfolders are created within `output_dir` every time a Simulation object is created. The most recent output can always be found in `output_dir/output_active`. This style preserves existing data, and running multiple times on the same `output_dir` will lead to a list of `output_dir/output_0123` folders with the data for each separate run.

The other style currently implemented is `RemovePreexisting`. With this style, if `output_dir` already exists, it will be overwritten with the new one.

Closes #3048
title: Restore OutputPathGenerator

body: With 3e9288c, atmos uses a feature that is available only in ClimaCore 0.14.6 onward
title: Fix compat for ClimaCore

body:
ClimaCoupler tests are failing for a field2array error (https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-ci/builds/3901). It could be a mismatch between the ClimaAtmos and ClimaCoupler versions, so I'd like to make a new release of Atmos.

```
ERROR: LoadError: DimensionMismatch: array size 15360 must be divisible by the product of the new dimensions (10, 10, 10, 1, Colon())
Stacktrace:
  [1] (::Base.var"#throw2#330")(A::SubArray{…}, dims::Tuple{…})
    @ Base ./reshapedarray.jl:123
  [2] _reshape_uncolon
    @ ./reshapedarray.jl:129 [inlined]
  [3] reshape(parent::SubArray{Float64, 2, Matrix{…}, Tuple{…}, false}, dims::Tuple{Int64, Int64, Int64, Int64, Colon})
    @ Base ./reshapedarray.jl:119
  [4] reshape
    @ ./reshapedarray.jl:118 [inlined]
  [5] array2data(array::SubArray{…}, ::ClimaCore.DataLayouts.VIJFH{…})
    @ ClimaAtmos.RRTMGPInterface /central/scratch/esm/slurm-buildkite/climacoupler-ci/depot/cpu/packages/ClimaAtmos/OGwjS/src/parameterized_tendencies/radiation/RRTMGPInterface.jl:86
  [6] array2field(array::SubArray{…}, space::ClimaCore.Spaces.ExtrudedFiniteDifferenceSpace{…})
    @ ClimaAtmos.RRTMGPInterface /central/scratch/esm/slurm-buildkite/climacoupler-ci/depot/cpu/packages/ClimaAtmos/OGwjS/src/parameterized_tendencies/radiation/RRTMGPInterface.jl:61
```
title: Bump to 0.24.2

body: This should allow us to see more of CUDA's `@profile` table, which is currently getting cut off pretty badly: https://github.com/ronisbr/PrettyTables.jl/issues/11#issuecomment-2145550354
title: Use ClimaTimeSteppers hcrop in benchmark_step
